title:
Modes of Extraction, Unequal Exchange, and the Progressive
Underdevelopment of an Extreme Periphery: The Brazilian Amazon,
1600--1980
abstract:
We develop a framework for analyzing unequal ecological exchange
between core and peripheral regions, drawing on the case of the
Brazilian Amazon.

develop a biophysical theory of unequal exchange.
